# Risdiplam 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Risdiplam 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Risdiplam</strong> 目前有 <strong>14 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Risdiplam 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Evrysdi is indicated for the treatment of 5q spinal muscular atrophy (SMA) in patients with a clinical diagnosis of SMA Type 1, Type 2 or Type 3 or with one to four SMN2 copies. &nbsp;</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>acne (disease)（99.5%）</li>
<li>drug-induced osteoporosis（97.7%）</li>
<li>zinc, elevated plasma（97.3%）</li>
<li>common wart（97.2%）</li>
<li>metastatic melanoma（96.8%）</li>
<li>dermatitis（96.6%）</li>
<li>non-cutaneous melanoma（96.2%）</li>
<li>acrodermatitis chronica atrophicans（96.1%）</li>
<li>epithelioid cell melanoma（95.9%）</li>
<li>eyelid melanoma（95.9%）</li>
<li>scrotum melanoma（95.8%）</li>
<li>neonatal dermatomyositis（95.7%）</li>
<li>multiple endocrine neoplasia（95.6%）</li>
<li>choroideremia（95.5%）</li>
<li>acne keloid（95.4%）</li>
<li>CDK4 linked melanoma（95.4%）</li>
<li>superficial spreading melanoma（95.4%）</li>
<li>malignant melanoma of the mucosa（95.4%）</li>
<li>nodular malignant melanoma（95.4%）</li>
<li>amelanotic skin melanoma（95.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/risdiplam/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
